items.title: Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport
items.dek: Authorities say they have put in place contingency measures as a labour dispute affects travel.
items.body: Authorities say they have put in place contingency measures as a labour dispute affects travel.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sydney kidnapping: Police appeal for return of man, 85, snatched by mistake
items.dek: Cases of mistaken identity have become increasingly common in Sydney's underworld, the SMH reported, as large organised crime networks increasingly subcontract
items.body: Cases of mistaken identity have become increasingly common in Sydney's underworld, the SMH reported, as large organised crime networks increasingly subcontract crimes. "The fact that these offenders – these kidnappers – have got it so wrong is concerning." submitted by /u/wewhomustnotbenamed [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Nigeria warns against enlisting abroad after reports of deaths in Ukraine
items.dek: The authorities say a growing number of citizens are being illegally recruited to fight elsewhere.
items.body: The authorities say a growing number of citizens are being illegally recruited to fight elsewhere.
items.author: IriLine Desk
